popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Randall Mainwaring, of Over Peover, Co. Chester, heir to his elder brother John (d. 1410). He was born no later than 1363, and d. 1456-57. He petitioned the king for enjoying the dower of Margery his …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet於1363年出生在英國爾奧維 奧福時，他的父親William De Mainwaring IV of chester47歲，母親Elizabeth De Leicester45歲。他於大約1388年與Lady Margery Venables , Baroness在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年6月在英國爾奧維 奧福享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet于1363年出生在英国爾奧維 奧福时，他的父亲William De Mainwaring IV of chester47岁，母亲Elizabeth De Leicester45岁。他于大约1388年与Lady Margery Venables , Baroness在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年6月在英国爾奧維 奧福享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: KT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 賈, see   Jia   1. Compare   Kah   2.
West African (Senegal): Tukulor name of unexplained etymology. Compare   Kah   1.

variants.name: Jia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ho, Hong, Li Ping, Tao, Ying, Bei, Hang, Jian, Lei, Aijun, Anning, Yiping.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 賈, meaning ‘price’ or ‘merchants’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Jia (賈), the name of a state (located in Linpan in Shanxi province) granted by King Kang of Zhou, to Gong Ming, a grandson of King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). After the state was annexed by the state of Jin, the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) from the placename Jia (賈), the name of a fief (located in Linpan in Shanxi province), granted to She, also called Jia Ji (賈季) or Jia Tuo (賈佗), son of a noble called Hu Yan in the state of Jin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Kah
meanings: West African (Gambia): variant of   Ka   2.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 賈, possibly based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Jia   1. Compare   Ka   1.
Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese name 嘉 (meaning ‘praise’), which was monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: ,Knight,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

nameMeanings.name: Baronet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Barnett  .
French: variant of   Bernet  .

variants.name: Barnett
meanings: English: habitational name from various places, for example Chipping (High) Barnet, East Barnet, and Friern Barnet in Greater London, named with Old English bærnet ‘place cleared by burning’ (a derivative of bærnan ‘to burn, to set light to’).
English (of Norman origin): from a medieval personal name, a variant of   Bernard  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): this surname has been adopted by Ashkenazic Jews in the English-speaking world, perhaps as an Anglicized form of a vaguely similar Jewish name such as   Baruch  .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet was born in 1363, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, his father, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, was 47 and his mother, Elizabeth De Leicester, was 45. He married Lady Margery Venables , Baroness about 1388, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died in June 1456, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, at the age of 93, and was buried in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet est né en 1363, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Leicester, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margery Venables , Baroness environ 1388, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1456, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet 1363 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Mainwaring IV of chester 47 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De Leicester 45. Er hat um 1388 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margery Venables , Baroness geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1456 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England und wurde in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet è nato il nel 1363 nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth De Leicester, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margery Venables , Baroness circa 1388, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1456, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronetが1363年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた時，父William De Mainwaring IV of chesterは47歳，母Elizabeth De Leicesterは45歳であった。約1388年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Margery Venables , Baronessと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年6月にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet(이)가 1363년 영국 체실르 버 프오버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Mainwaring IV of chester(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De Leicester(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Lady Margery Venables , Baroness(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 6월 영국 체실르 버 프오버에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet nasceu em 1363, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Leicester, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margery Venables , Baroness aproximadamente 1388, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1456, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet родился в 1363 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Mainwaring IV of chester было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Leicester, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margery Venables , Baroness около 1388 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер июнь 1456 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet nació en 1363, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Leicester, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Lady Margery Venables , Baroness aproximadamente 1388, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en junio de 1456, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
